sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الزِّيَارَةُ بَيْنَ الأُسَرِ عَادَةً مُهِمَّةً.
sentences.translation: Posjete između porodica bile su važan običaj.
sentences.translationEn: Visits between families were an important custom.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الضَّيْفُ يُقَدَّمُ لَهُ الشَّايُ وَالْحَلْوَى.
sentences.translation: Gostu se nudilo čaj i slatkiši.
sentences.translationEn: The guest would be offered tea and sweets.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْجِيرَانُ يَزُورُونَ بَعْضَهُمْ كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Komšije su se posjećivale svake sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: The neighbours used to visit each other every week.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الزِّيَارَاتُ تُقَوِّي الْعَلَاقَاتِ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Posjete su jačale odnose među ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: The visits strengthened the relationships between people.
